title: Useful Rotten Flesh
body:
This is my first mod, i made it for my friend as a small project.
I made this mod in MCreator. Mod was called "better rotten flesh" but has been renamed.

This mod allows you to cook rotten flesh and use it as a proper food source.
You can also turn rotten flesh into other stuff.

2 rotten flesh next to each other to make leather.

Enjoy!

ps: im not sure about cli and ser side so install on both?

0.2 will be the last version **when it comes out**
